title: Ra/Radio Noise*Planet
titleNative: ラ/ラジオノイズ＊プラネット
synopsis: A planet with 6 inhabitants only. In order to match the tuning of the radio, the main character walks around and meets the 5 other inhabitants. A strange SF short animation.

title: Koala's Diary
synonyms: บันทึกไดอารีของโคอาล่า
synopsis: The manga is about Koala who writes about daily life, whether it's good or bad, happy or sad, Koala treats every day as a precious day. Koala believes that today is a good day, and tomorrow will be a good day too. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Chibi Kero: Secret of the Kero Ball!?
titleEnglish: Chibi Kero: Secret of the Kero Ball!?
titleNative: ちびケロ ケロボールの秘密!?
synopsis: A young Keroro tries to impress Pururu by showing off the Kero Ball, a ball borrowed by Giroro from his brother Garuru. While testing the buttons, he accidentally transports the 4 tadpoles inside the ball. To get out, they must win the pinball maze. In the outside world, a young blue tadpole Kururu picks up the ball and hears the cries of help. He makes a deal to free those trapped inside if he gets a plate of curry rice. A deal is a deal and with the Kero Ball, a plate of curry rice is produced for Kururu. Unfortunately, the plate grows bigger and bigger and bigger. It got so big, that Kururu was immersed in the curry. The yellow curry slowly transforms the blue Kururu into the "yellow devil" and as the film is about to fade into black, "Kukuku" is heard. (Summary found on Veoh.com)

title: THUNDER
synopsis: A woman’s face disappearing behind, and emerging from, a pair of hands. Flashing lights. An empty building full of dark hallways. Designs drawn in the air with light and long-exposure cinematography. (Source: TMDB)

tags.name: Denpa
tags.description: Works that feature themes of social dissociation, delusions, and other issues like suicide, bullying, self-isolation, paranoia, and technological necessity in daily lives. Classic iconography: telephone poles, rooftops, and trains.

title: Right Places: Where I Was Meant to Be at That Time
titleRomaji: Right Places: Sono Toki, Boku no Irubeki Basho
titleEnglish: Right Places: Where I Was Meant to Be at That Time
titleNative: Right Places その時, ぼくの居るべき場所
synopsis: The narrator, an unnamed adolescent boy living in the present time in an unspecified part of Japan, begins to notice that he can see strange creatures that no one else seems to be able to see. As time passes, he ruminates over his relationship with these creatures, why he is able to see them, and what it says about the person he is. One day, however, he notices that one of these creatures seems to be behaving differently than before... (Source: tMDb)

tags.name: Trains

title: Wowser
titleNative: どんどんドメルとロン
synopsis: Dommel is a lazy dog who does nothing more than eating and sleeping. His owner, Semafoor, is an inventor of the strangest things you could imagine. Together this becomes a mix for some funny events. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

title: Little Women
synopsis: This is a TV special based on the novel, Little Women, by Louisa May Alcott. It covers a year in the lives of four sisters, Meg, Jo, Beth, and Amy as their father is away fighting in the American Civil War.

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

title: Yajikita Gakuen Douchuuki
synopsis: Shinokita Reiko and Yajima Junko are second-year high school students who travel from school to school fighting bad guys, ninjas, yakuza and corruption. At this high school they encounter a secret ninja order and a corrupt administrator, as well as a tragic death in the distant past. With the help of Kotetsu, a skilled ninja, they set the school to rights, but not before leaving several broken hearts behind.

title: The Monster Of Frankenstein
titleNative: 恐怖伝説　怪奇！フランケンシュタイン
synopsis: Monster of Frankenstein is a reasonably standard retelling of the classic book by Mary Shelley. In a foreboding castle scientist Dr Victor Frankenstein performs a hideous experiment which he hopes will bring the dead back to life. With the help of his assistant he is successful in reanimating a man recreated from parts gathered from corpses but the creature is unpredictable and horrifying. The doctor flees back to his home in Switzerland leaving his assistant in charge of destroying the monster. But Dr Frankenstein soon finds that he cannot hide from his shameful secret forever as mysterious murders are committed around him forcing him to question if his creation really is dead and gone...

title: Turnover
synopsis: The story centers around Chizuru, who moved from Yamaguchi to Tokyo, and cannot keep up with the pace of her studies. Losing sight of her dream because of discouraging marks in practice exams, she talks to her former classmate Shōta, and slowly begins changing the way she studies. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: A man trapped on a raft in the middle of the ocean is in desperate need of water. Luckily for him, a few drops of rain water are about to fall from the raft's mast. Comedy ensues as the thirsty man attempts to drink the few small drops of water. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The Epic of Zektbach
titleNative: The Epic of Zektbach　第一章　シャムシールの舞
synonyms: The Epic Of ZektBach: Daiisshou: Shamshir no Mai
The Epic Of ZektBach: Chapter 1: Shamshir Dance
synopsis: The story begins when the kingdom of Noigllado suddenly invades the small country of Azuelgatt and brings it to the brink of destruction. General Adnowell leads Noigllado's troops against Azuelgatt's final, remaining line of defense: the fortress Doroah, led by a skilled female warrior named Shamshir. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Harbor Light Monogatari: Fashion Lala yori
titleRomaji: Harbor Light Monogatari: Fashion Lala yori
titleNative: ハーバーライト物語 ファッションララより
synonyms: Fashion Lala: The Story of the Harbor Light
synopsis: A Cinderella story of sorts, Fashion Lala stars a little girl named Miho who doesn't get along with her family. Miho loves to design clothing, but her aunt and three cousins don't believe that such a young girl is capable and mock her designs. Meanwhile, a contest for the new "Disco Queen" is coming up, and Miho wants nothing more than to be able to design a dress for someone to wear to the competition, since she's too young to enter herself. With determination and a little bit of magic, Miho's dreams just might come true!

title: Classic★Stars
synopsis: At Gloria Private Academy, where stars are born, Beethoven was a fighter, until music chose him. In the prestigious music department, students who match the talent of legendary musicians inherit their gifts and names. Trading his gloves for melodies, he steps into a world where notes hit harder than fists, determined to win the ultimate competition. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Lucifer and the Biscuit Hammer
synonyms: ศึกอลวนต่างดาวป่วนโลก
synopsis: One day, unremarkable college student Yuuhi Amamiya meets a talking lizard who asks for his help saving Earth from a crisis. Before he can refuse, Yuuhi is turned into a member of the Beast Knights and given a ring that gives him the psychic power “domain control.” He is then immediately attacked by an enemy! But just as all seems lost, he’s saved by the girl next door, Samidare. But it turns out Samidare isn’t really a savior of any kind… she’s actually a demon lord who wants to conquer Earth! Drawn to her absurd strength and evil charms, Yuuhi becomes her devoted servant and acts to support her wicked schemes. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Wings of the World
synopsis: The story takes place in 1633 in the city of Wanguo. It follows Chang Feng, a young woman who joins the mysterious "Tian Gong" organization to fight against Spanish settlers and other foreigners.

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Decent work
synopsis: An office worker observes and reports on the work of a certain dwarf. One day during lunch, an accident occurs.

title: Light Catcher
synopsis: "Light Catcher" is an initiative by bilibili to support Chinese original animation. For professional animation teams, independent animation teams, and animation enthusiasts, the Capsules project, Cosmoses project, and Ores project are launched to discover outstanding works and teams. By providing a platform to showcase works and supporting opportunities, bilibili seeks to encourage more talented people to participate in animation production. The short film uses a protagonist running forward as the main theme. The constantly escalating painting style and the setbacks and help the protagonist encounters while running symbolizes the growth of a novice animators through continuous self-learning and relying on the people around them for support, until their final work is seen by the world. (Source: bilibili, translated)

tags.name: Stop Motion
